'''Hella Brün''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] who had served [[Bequesh]], [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of the [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]], for twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] as of [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. A proficient [[Unarmed combat/Legends|martial artist]], Brün projected a persona of being a brash, confident woman, when, in reality, she was actually a shy individual.

==Biography==
Hella Brün was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was employed as the chief [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] and aide for [[Bequesh]], the [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] of the [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]]. She began her employment in [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], and served Bequesh capably, accompanying him as he went about his business on the [[Space station/Legends|station]] and saving his life on several occasions. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], Brün had served in the position for two decades.<ref name="SD" />

==Personality and traits==
A tall, sharp featured woman with a guarded smile, Hella Brün was outwardly brash and self-confident, but in private she was a shy individual. As befitting her station as a bodyguard, she was trained to use a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. She was also proficient in melee combat and [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]], and specialized in a form of martial arts that emphasized striking pressure points on an opponent's body to inflict pain but no permanent injuries. Brün could be stealthy when the need arose, and could use her skills to intimidate others.<ref name="SD" />

Knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and cultures, Brün had a working understanding of [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]] and was familiar with the inner workings and business that went on aboard ''Tanquilla Beach''. She could operate the weapon systems and [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] systems aboard [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], and had experience with security systems and demolitions. Brün was also known to [[Gambling/Legends|gamble]].<ref name="SD" />

==Equipment==
To aid her in her duties, Brün was armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="SD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Hella Brün appeared in ''[[Shintel Downtime]]'', the fourth [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and published in [[1995]].<ref name="SD" />
